eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 2:22 AM on JUN 24, 2026 Effective until 3:22 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a test of the Emergency Alert System from the Nevada State Police. This is only a test.
Federal state and local officials use the Emergency Alert System to keep you informed in the event of an emergency or disaster through your local radio television and cable providers.
This test helps ensure that Emergency Alert System participants are able to provide critical information during an emergency.
This concludes this test of the Emergency Alert System.
